zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies於1245年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾時，他的父親Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland31歲，母親Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness36歲。他於1271年之前與Lady Margaret de Bonkyl結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1298年7月22日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可享年53歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies于1245年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾时，他的父亲Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland31岁，母亲Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness36岁。他于1271年之前与Lady Margaret de Bonkyl结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1298年7月22日在苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可享年53岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies was born in 1245, in Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, was 31 and his mother, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, was 36. He married Lady Margaret de Bonkyl before 1271. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 July 1298, in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 53, and was buried in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies est né en 1245, à Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret de Bonkyl avant 1271. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1298, à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies 1245 in Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland 31 und seine Mutter Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness 36. Er hat vor 1271 Lady Margaret de Bonkyl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1298 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies è nato il nel 1245 nel Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret de Bonkyl prima del 1271. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1298, nel Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garliesが1245年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotlandは31歳，母Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchionessは36歳であった。1271年以前にLady Margaret de Bonkylと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1298年7月22日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクで53歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアファルキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies(이)가 1245년 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1271년 이전 Lady Margaret de Bonkyl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 7월 22일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 파커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies nasceu em 1245, em Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret de Bonkyl antes 1271. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1298, em Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies родился в 1245 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret de Bonkyl перед 1271 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 июля 1298 г. в местности фалкирк, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности фалкирк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Stewart, Lord of Bonkyll and Garlies nació en 1245, en Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret de Bonkyl antes de 1271. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1298, en Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
